# Marek Paňko (JustFossa)

> Full-stack software engineer in Ústí nad Labem, Czechia. Designs and builds fast, high-converting websites and web apps that bring businesses more customers — from first pixel to production.

## About

Marek Paňko is a full-stack software engineer with 5+ years of experience shipping production software. He helps businesses turn ideas into fast, high-converting websites and web applications. He owns projects end to end — design, frontend, backend, infrastructure — so clients work with one accountable person rather than an agency hand-off chain.

- Location: Ústí nad Labem, Czechia (serves clients across Czechia and remotely)
- Languages: Czech, English
- Stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Go, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS
- Availability: takes a limited number of select client projects; replies within 24 hours
- Business: registered in Czechia — IČO 23702524, DIČ CZ0709066886
- Certifications: Google Cybersecurity; Certified Agentic AI Expert; ISC2 Candidate

## Services

- Business websites — fast, modern, mobile-first sites built to turn visitors into paying customers.
- Custom web apps & software — booking/ordering systems, internal tools, dashboards, automation.
- Redesign, speed & SEO — speeding up and refining existing sites to rank higher and convert more.

## Selected results

- ideacomp.cz — corporate website built in Next.js. PageSpeed (desktop): Performance 94, Accessibility 98, SEO 100; First Contentful Paint 0.4s.
- asunalabs.com — software-studio website built in Next.js. PageSpeed (desktop): Performance 94; First Contentful Paint 0.5s.
- 24NewsRO — AI-powered news aggregation platform (built at Asuna Labs), reaching 20,000+ monthly readers.
